name: openai-developers
description: Build with OpenAI APIs and Agents SDK, and create and save OpenAI API keys from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Develop AI apps and agents with the OpenAI API and Agents SDK following OpenAI best practices
interface.longDescription: Use OpenAI Developers in Codex to build AI applications and agents with OpenAI docs, the OpenAI API, and Agents SDK. Connect to the OpenAI Platform (platform.openai.com) and see your Codex-built apps work right out of the box with real OpenAI API keys. Run and locally deploy Agents SDK projects through the Deployment Manager.
defaultPrompt: Create an OpenAI API key to use in this project
Build an app that uses AI to generate haikus
Build an agent with the Agents SDK
